title: College of Engineering celebrates a record cohort of graduates prepared to shape lives
summary_en: On May 9, 2026, in the Kohl Center on the University of Wisconsin-Madison campus, 1,000 engineering students gathered for a joyful celebration that, for many, marked the culmination of their studies and the beginning of…
title_cn: 威斯康星大学麦迪逊分校工程学院庆祝史上最大规模毕业生群体
